name: Site Address Points
description: Site Address Points both current and historical for Kitsap County and all Cities.  This is a central data repository updated daily by the address technicians of each jurisdiction.  The (KSAM) Kitsap Address Management Web Editing application is used to both validate and provide the address data owners with direct edit access to this feature class.

name: Geologically Hazardous Areas
description: The GEOHAZARDS feature class is a union of the DNR & Natural Resource Conservation Service's (SCS) 1980 Soil Survey for Kitsap County and the soil STABILITY classification from the 1979 "Quaternary Geology and Stratigraphy of Kitsap County" thesis work by Jerald Deeter. The original Stability coverage was obtained by digitizing the "Slope Stability Map of Kitsap County" from the Deeter thesis. This work was performed by Kitsap County GIS. description: This data set is the Kitsap County Zoning Designations. The shaded land use designations are defined in the text of the Land Use Element available from the Department of Community Development. NO

name: Shoreline Master Plan Environmental Designations
description: What is the Shoreline Master Program (SMP)?In 1971, the people of the State of Washington voted for the Shoreline Management Act (SMA).The SMA has three primary purposes:1) To protect ecological functions;2) To accommodate appropriate uses; and3) To maintain public access.The Shoreline Master Program (SMP) implements the policies of the SMA at the local level by regulating use and development along shorelines. The Department of Ecology is responsible for ensuring that the local SMP is consistent

name: Category II Critical Aquifer Recharge Areas
provider: Various Data Sources, Compiled by Kitsap County DCD/GIS
description: Critical Aquifer Recharge Areas means those land areas that contain hydrogeologic conditions that facilitate aquifer recharge and/or transmit contaminants to an underlying aquifer. Critical aquifer recharge areas under this title may be established based on general criteria, specifically designated due to special circumstances, or based on scientific studies and mapping efforts. name: Water District Outlines
description: Water district boundaries within Kitsap County. Boundaries were obtained from the jurisdiction and used to generate the present data set to be spatially accurate and adjusted to the county's parcel base map. Utility boundaries will be updated as annexations occur, and adjusted as needed to the parcel map.

name: Voter Precinct Outlines
description: This data layer was created to show the Kitsap County voting precincts based on 2020 Federal Census/Redistricting. Precinct boundaries updated November 2023.

name: Utility District Outlines
description: Utility district boundaries within Kitsap County. Boundaries were obtained from the jurisdiction and used to generate the present data set to be spatially accurate and adjusted to the county's parcel base map. Utility boundaries will be updated as annexations occur, and adjusted as needed to the parcel map.

name: USGS Quarter Quadrants
description: USGS Quarter Quadrants

name: Surface Stormwater - Valve
description: Storm valve is a point layer that depicts valves in the stormwater valve system of the Kitsap County Stormwater system.

name: Surface Stormwater - Storm Basin
description: Storm basin is a polygon layer that depicts drainage basins of the stormwater basin system of the Kitsap County Stormwater system.

name: Surface Stormwater - Outfall
description: Outfalls is a point layer that depicts outfalls of the Kitsap County stormwater conveyance system to a receiving water or other jurisdiction.

name: Surface Stormwater - Local Improvement District
description: Storm Lid is a polygon layer that depicts low imparct development of the stormwater lid system of the Kitsap County Stormwater system.

name: Surface Stormwater - Flood Plain
description: Storm flood plain is a polygon layer that depicts flood plains of the stormwater flood plains system of the Kitsap County Stormwater system.

name: Surface Stormwater - Conveyance
description: Storm conveyance is a line layer that depicts underground gravity pipes of the stormwater conveyance system of the Kitsap County Stormwater system.

name: Surface Stormwater - Catch Basin
description: Storm catch basin is a point layer that depicts catch bains of the stormwater conveyance system of the Kitsap County Stormwater system.

name: Surface Geology
description: Surface Geology

name: Street Center Lines
description: Street Centerline data for the entire County including the Cities. Main features include the names of the streets and the address ranges utilized by E-911.

name: Soil Stability from Deeter Survey
description: "Quaternary Geology and Stratigraphy of Kitsap County", - Jerald Deeter 1979 thesis (WWU). The original slope stability coverage was obtained by digitizing the "Slope Stability Map of Kitsap County" from the Deeter 1979 thesis. This work was performed by Kitsap County GIS. Accuracy and precision standards used for digitizing are unknown. Spatial accuracy is fairly good at small scales, however, accuracy diminishes as the scale increases. Horizontal displacement is quite noticeable along shorelin

name: Shoreline outside of Kitsap County
description: Shorelines outside of Kitsap County

name: Sewer Service Area
description: ServiceArea is a shape layer that depicts the areas in the county in which properties are alowed to connect to the Kitsap County Sewer System. I contains a number of historical service areas as well as current ones.

name: Sewer Manholes
description: Manholes is a point layer that depicts manholes of the wastewater conveyance system of the Kitsap County Wastewater system.

name: Sewer Gravity Mains
description: Gravity Main is a line layer that depicts underground gravity pipes of the wastewater conveyance system of the Kitsap County Wastewater system.

name: Sewer Force Mains
description: Forcemain is a line layer that depicts underground pressure pipes of the wastewater conveyance system of the Kitsap County Wastewater system.

name: Sewer Facilities
description: Structure is a point layer that depicts wetwells and Treatment Plants of the wastewater conveyance system of the Kitsap County Wastewater system.

name: Sewer District Outlines
description: Sewer district boundaries within Kitsap County. Boundaries were obtained from the jurisdiction and used to generate the present data set to be spatially accurate and adjusted to the county's parcel base map.

name: Sewer Cleanout
description: Cleanout is a point layer that depicts sewer cleanouts of the Kitsap County Wastewater system.

name: Section Subdivisions
description: Public Land Survey Sections

name: School Points
description: School locations in a point feature.

name: School District Outlines
description: School district boundaries within Kitsap County. Boundaries were obtained from the jurisdiction and used to generate the present data set to be spatially accurate and adjusted to the county's parcel base map.

name: SCS Soil Survey
provider: Washington State Department of Natural Resources, Soil Conservation Service, USDA Forest Service and Washignton State University.
description: This soils feature class is a cleaned and edited version of WA Department of Natural Resources and Soil Conservation Service soils coverage for Washington State received in December of 2000.      Soil polygons were merged to eliminate township lines from original coverage after its convertion to a feature class.  Slivers, overlaps, and other topological discrepancies were cleaned, and DNR soil map unit names and identifier symbol ('IDENTIFIER') were added to the attribute table.  Polygons were s

name: Limited Areas of More Intense Rural Development
provider: Kitsap County Department of Community Development
tags: Limited Areas of More Intense Rural Development
description: LAMIRD = Limited Areas of More Intense Rural Development In accordance with Washington State's Growth Management Act (GMA), the county may designate limited areas of more intensive rural development as part of the mandatory rural element portion of its Comprehensive Plan. In Kitsap County's Comprehensive Plan dated May 7, 1998, it was determined that the GMA would provide Kitsap County an opportunity to help reconcile the historical land use patterns which have developed throughout the years.

name: Legislative District Outlines
description: This data layer was created to show the Legislative District boundary lines based on 2022 Washington state redistricting.

name: Law Enforcement Facility Locations
description: Law Enforcement Facilities within Kitsap County.

name: Kitsap County Wetlands
description: This feature class is a combination of various wetland data sources into one comprehensive data layer for Kitsap County. Data sets used include DNR 2000 Hydrology, NWI Wetlands data, Bainbridge Island wetland inventory data, and survey delineated wetlands extracted from the county's accurate parcel map sections. Polygons from all layers were individually evaluated against areal photography. Polygons identifying wetlands where redevelopment has occurred were not included into the final product. P

name: Kitsap County Marinas
description: Marina Locations

name: Incorporated City Limit Outlines
description: Incorporated cities within Kitsap County. City jurisdictional boundaries were obtained from individual jurisdictions in various formats and used to generate the present data set to be spatially accurate and adjusted to the County's parcel base map. Bremerton and Port Orchard city limits were updated with the direct input from each jurisdiction. The final product was verified by the same. City boundaries will be updated as annexations occur, and adjusted as needed to the parcel map.

name: Fire Station Locations
description: Kitsap County Fire Stations

name: Fire District Outlines
description: Fire district boundaries within Kitsap County. Boundaries were obtained from the jurisdiction and used to generate the present data set to be spatially accurate and adjusted to the county's parcel base map.

name: Designated Urban Growth Areas
description: This data set is the Urban Growth Areas Boundaries. Designated Urban Growth Areas are intended to accommodate 20 years population growth, based on official growth management forecasts adopted by the Office of Financial Management. The Kitsap Regional Coordinating Council (KRCC) - comprised of elected officials of the region's governmental entities - is the body charged with making such allocations. Consistent with the Growth Management Act, Urban Growth Areas may change over time to reflect popu

name: County Commissioner District Outlines
description: This data layer was created to show the Kitsap County Commissioner Districts based on 2021 Washington state redistricting updated in Jan. 2022.

name: Congressional District Outlines
description: This data layer was created to show the Congressional districts based on 2012 Washington state redistricting.

name: Community Facility Locations
description: Community public facilities and resources within Kitsap County.

name: City Council Outlines
description: City council/ward districts. Boundaries were obtained from the jurisdiction and used to generate the present data set to be spatially accurate and adjusted to the County's parcel base map. Boundaries will be updated as annexations occur, and adjusted as needed to the parcel map.

name: Building Outlines
description: This feature class contains building footprints for all unincorporated areas of Kitsap County, Washington and most of the incoporated cities therein. The footprint data is not based on any survey or legal description and is not intended to take the place of either. Please read the terms of use and instructions before using this data.
